title: get all leads returns leads array
description: Verify that GET /api/leads returns a 200 status code with an array of leads in the response body.

title: post leads creates new lead
description: Verify that POST /api/leads with valid first_name, last_name, email, and company creates a new lead, returns 201 status, and the lead can be retrieved with GET /api/leads/<id>.

title: put leads updates existing lead
description: Verify that PUT /api/leads/<id> with updated lead fields returns 200 status and the lead record is updated accordingly.

title: patch leads status updates lead status
description: Verify that PATCH /api/leads/<id>/status with a valid status value returns 200 status and the lead's status is updated and confirmed by GET /api/leads/<id>.

title: patch leads stage updates lead stage
description: Verify that PATCH /api/leads/<id>/stage with a valid stage value returns 200 status and the lead's stage is updated and confirmed by GET /api/leads/<id>.

title: get leads id returns error for nonexistent lead
description: Verify that GET /api/leads/<id> with a non-existent lead id returns an error response indicating the lead was not found.

title: post leads returns validation error for missing fields
description: Verify that POST /api/leads with missing required fields returns a validation error response.

title: get leads id followups returns followup tasks
description: Verify that GET /api/leads/<id>/followups returns 200 status with an array of follow-up tasks for the specified lead.

title: post leads id followups creates followup task
description: Verify that POST /api/leads/<id>/followups with valid follow-up details creates a new follow-up task, returns 201 status, and the task appears in subsequent GET /api/leads/<id>/followups responses.

title: patch leads followups complete marks followup complete
description: Verify that PATCH /api/leads/followups/<followup_id>/complete marks the specified follow-up task as completed and returns 200 status with updated follow-up status.
